title: vulpia bromoides var. sciuroides
intro: Vulpia bromoides var. sciuroides, also known as Squirreltail Fescue, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Squirreltail Fescue include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Squirreltail Fescue include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
